---
title: "A test fixture for quartobot scan"
author: Test Author
bibliography:
  - references.bib
---

# Introduction

The manubot pattern is described in @doi:10.1371/journal.pcbi.1007128.
A PubMed citation: @pmid:31479462. An arXiv preprint: @arxiv:2104.10729.
A book: @isbn:9780262035613. A bare DOI: @10.1038/s41586-024-12345.
A hand-curated entry: @quarto2024.

# Multiple citations

A bracketed group [@doi:10.1371/journal.pcbi.1007128; @quarto2024; @pmid:99999999].
A citation with locator [@arxiv:2104.10729, p. 33].
A negated cite [-@doi:10.1371/journal.pcbi.1007128] suppresses the author.

# Things that should NOT be detected

An email address: you@example.com should not be a cite key.

Inline code: `@doi:10.1371/inline_should_be_skipped` should not appear.

```python
# Fenced code blocks should be skipped, even with @doi:10.1371/inline_2
print("@doi:10.1371/fenced_should_be_skipped")
```

~~~
@doi:10.1371/tilde_fence_should_be_skipped
~~~

Back to prose: @url:https://manubot.org and @wikidata:Q56458094.
